segments.text: 道者，令民與上同意，可與之死，可與之生，而不畏危也；天者，陰陽、寒暑、時制也；地者，遠近、險易、廣狹、死生也；將者，智、信、仁、勇、嚴也；法者，曲制、官道、主用也。
凡此五者，將莫不聞，知之者勝，不知者不勝。

draftRationale.segmentation: The paragraph naturally splits into two sentences: (1) five parallel definitions of 道、天、地、將、法 separated by semicolons; (2) a concluding remark about these five elements. The first sentence is long but forms a cohesive definitional list, so kept as one segment.
